name: youtube-channel-admin
description: Manage your YouTube channel: upload videos and thumbnails, edit titles/descriptions/tags/privacy, moderate and reply to comments, fetch captions and query analytics — with a performance dashboard and home widgets for top videos and alerts.

metadata.short_description: Manage your YouTube channel: uploads, metadata, comments and analytics.
metadata.mesh_description: The YouTube Channel Admin MCP connects to your Google account (OAuth) and manages your channel end-to-end: resumable video uploads (from a URL or from the org's object storage), custom thumbnails, title/description/tags/privacy edits, caption listing and transcript export, comment listing/reply/moderation, and YouTube Analytics queries. Ships a channel dashboard plus home widgets showing top videos, 28-day performance and alerts for videos with upload/processing problems or comments held for review.
